query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.email, s.id as sub_id, s.userId as sub_user_id, s.stripeCustomerId, s.stripeSubscriptionId, s.status as sub_status FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId ORDER BY u.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2LaWadDEvwzJBKf.root --database 2yeo54CKUnZhz2uBtEnQQ8 --execute SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.email, s.id as sub_id, s.userId as sub_user_id, s.stripeCustomerId, s.stripeSubscriptionId, s.status as sub_status FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId ORDER BY u.id;
